archetype.name: Mauler
archetype.note: This archetype offers Unbalancing Sweep at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Warrior Of Legend
archetype.note: This archetype offers Unbalancing Sweep at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Unbalancing Sweep
feat.text: You make a great sweep with your weapon or fists about yourself, knocking creatures off their feet and away from you. Choose up to three enemies within your reach and choose whether to Shove or Trip all three of them. Whichever of the two options you choose, roll a separate Athletics check against each enemy, performing the same action against each enemy. Each attempt counts toward your multiple attack penalty, but don't increase your penalty until you have made all the attempts.

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
